text.p: I'm very glad to read your email this Wednesday morning (1.03 am). I'm sorry that I don't check the hotmail very often but you can always get me on yahoo. Glad to hear that you are doing well spiritually and that you passed your exams. That you even scored the highest in my subject : English! Glory be to God. It is a sign of greater heights in Jesus name.
How are your parents, brothers and sisters? How is ? How is Bro ? Is Bro still in your house? Please tell me about everybody in your reply.

I am sorry that I couldn't contact you ever since I left . I hope you forgive me? I really tried to send emails to your former address but there was no reply. Well, that is all now story because I now have your email address. Do you have a phone number that I can reach you on?
Have you registered for JAMB? What course are you planning to study and how are you getting along? What are you doing at the moment? Has gained admission?
I thank Almighty God for bringing me to for my studies. I have wonderful brethren who we fellowship together. In fact, we are having the Easter retreat in the church headquarters here this weekend.
You asked about daddy's ministry in your mail. By the grace of God the ministry is fine and everybody is fine in .
I know that victory is certain for you in Jesus name because you are God's beloved. It is well with you.
I eagerly look forward to hearing from you. I wish you the best of Easter blessings. Hope you are attending the retreat?
